title: A BAROMFITERMELŐK FOKOZOTTABB TÁMOGATÁSA RÉSZVÉTELEN ALAPULÓ MEGKÖZELÍTÉSSEL A JÁRVÁNYVÉDELEMBEN
description: A guide presenting a participatory workshop approach to enhance support for poultry farmers in epidemic prevention through facilitated group sessions led by veterinarians and trained animators. It outlines a three-step process—diagnosis, monitoring, and evaluation—to foster farmer-driven biosecurity improvements and sustainable practice changes.
